description:
The OrientByVelocity component makes particles orient the ``Up`` axis of the particle in the direction they are moving.

This component is part of the Photon Dust system made by Frooxius.

fields.Up: What axis of the particle to orient in the direction the particle is moving.

usage: Attach to a slot, add to the list of modules in a ParticleSystem, and adjust the values to make the desired effect from this component.
